sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1024" key="a)gxilexh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγχι-λεχής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n1024.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">close to the bed</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0239.tlg002:66" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antim.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">66</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
